title: Mate and monitor reproduction of alpacas
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Mate and monitor reproduction of alpacas demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare animals for mating

pcs.text: Select male and female animals to be mated from the studs' mating plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select male and female animals to be mated from the studs' mating plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select male and female animals to be mated from the studs' mating plan.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to address risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment applicable to task.

pcs.text: Determine and record condition of animals selected for mating according to industry practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and record condition of animals selected for mating according to industry practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and record condition of animals selected for mating according to industry practices.

pcs.text: Adjust nutritional program where required and monitor to produce optimum condition for mating
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adjust nutritional program where required and monitor to produce optimum condition for mating?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust nutritional program where required and monitor to produce optimum condition for mating.

pcs.text: Prepare over-fleeced females to ensure that tail and vulva area are clean and free of fleece
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare over-fleeced females to ensure that tail and vulva area are clean and free of fleece?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare over-fleeced females to ensure that tail and vulva area are clean and free of fleece.

pcs.text: Check animals for signs of infection or other reason not to proceed with planned mating and take remedial action as appropriate
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check animals for signs of infection or other reason not to proceed with planned mating and take remedial action as appropriate?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check animals for signs of infection or other reason not to proceed with planned mating and take remedial action as appropriate.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare animals for mating

elements.title: Facilitate mating

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify receptive females?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify receptive females.

pcs.text: Ensure paddock or pen mating areas are secure and provide access for handlers during joining
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure paddock or pen mating areas are secure and provide access for handlers during joining?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure paddock or pen mating areas are secure and provide access for handlers during joining.

pcs.text: Use mating procedures and handling techniques that minimise stress and discomfort to animals according to workplace health and safety requirements and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use mating procedures and handling techniques that minimise stress and discomfort to animals according to workplace health and safety requirements and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use mating procedures and handling techniques that minimise stress and discomfort to animals according to workplace health and safety requirements and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Supervise pen mating and intervene when required to maximise conception rates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise pen mating and intervene when required to maximise conception rates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise pen mating and intervene when required to maximise conception rates.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Facilitate mating

elements.title: Complete mating procedures

pcs.text: Undertake or commission pregnancy test and identify pregnancy status of animals and take suitable action as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake or commission pregnancy test and identify pregnancy status of animals and take suitable action as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake or commission pregnancy test and identify pregnancy status of animals and take suitable action as required.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete required mating records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete required mating records.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete mating procedures

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
